current_record: 5-3 (2nd in UFL as of 2026-05-21; UFL operates as a single 8-team league with no conferences/divisions for 2026)

venue.name: Audi Field
venue.notes: Shared with D.C. United (MLS) and the Washington Spirit (NWSL)

ownership.primary_owner: Dwayne Johnson and Dany Garcia (Alpha Acquico) / Fox Corporation
ownership.ownership_group: UFL is jointly owned by Dwayne Johnson's Alpha Acquico, Dany Garcia, RedBird Capital Partners, and Fox Corporation following the 2024 XFL-USFL merger

head_coach.name: Shannon Harris
head_coach.background: Promoted from interim to permanent head coach after the 2025 season. Took over one week before 2025 kickoff when Reggie Barlow left for Tennessee State; went 6-4 in the regular season and 2-0 in the playoffs, winning the 2025 UFL Championship and earning Buddy Teevens UFL Coach of the Year. Previously served as Tennessee State's offensive coordinator under Barlow.

verification_notes: ESPN team ID 112646 confirmed via UFL teams API (https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/ufl/teams) — endpoint returned all 8 UFL franchises and DC Defenders matched location='DC', abbreviation='DC'. The DC Defenders did not appear in any scoreboard?dates=YYYYMMDD probe in mid-April 2026 because they had bye weeks on those exact dates; using teams/{id}/schedule is the more reliable route for verification. UFL eliminated conferences/divisions for the 2026 season — left conference and division fields null per source. Record 5-3 mid-season as of 2026-05-21; Defenders sit 2nd behind Orlando Storm (6-2). Coaching staff and roster left as empty arrays — UFL roster data is not surfaced cleanly by ESPN team endpoints and the daily recap prompt does not lean on rosters. Stadium capacity left null; Audi Field's published capacity for MLS is ~20,000 but UFL configurations may differ and no authoritative UFL-specific figure was located. Next game May 22 vs Orlando (today's date) — record could change.
